team.description: Review members and pending invitations for the selected restaurant.
team.setupRestaurantFirst: Select or create a restaurant first.
team.inviteNoRole: You do not have permission to send invitations for this organization.
team.inviteSingleRoleHint: Only this role is available for you to assign.
team.noMembers: No members yet for this restaurant.
team.directoryEmptyDescription: Restaurant owners, organization owners, and people with a manager or employee seat at this location appear here, along with pending email invitations.
team.directoryFilteredEmptyDescription: Try another email, user id, role, or status keyword.
team.directorySearchPlaceholder: Search by email or user id…

schedule.description: Drag the week around, assign shifts, and publish the week so employees can see them.
schedule.publishWeekConfirmBody: {{count}} draft shift(s) will become visible to assigned employees. You can still edit them afterwards.
schedule.gridNoMembersDescription: Invite teammates from the Members page before assigning shifts.
schedule.drawerMemberNone: No assignable members at this restaurant.
schedule.drawerNotesPlaceholder: Anything the team should know about this shift
schedule.drawerDeleteConfirm: Cancel this shift? This action can't be undone, but you can re-create it.
schedule.drawerPublishedWarn: This shift is already published. Saving will quietly update the published version — be sure to let the assigned member know.
schedule.drawerTemplateDetachWarn: Editing detaches this shift from its weekly template.
schedule.drawerErrorTime: End time must be after start time.
schedule.drawerErrorOverlap: Another non-cancelled shift overlaps this window.
schedule.drawerErrorGeneric: Could not save the shift. Try again.
schedule.drawerErrorNoDays: Pick at least one day of the week.
schedule.drawerSectionsHint: Tip credit goes to whoever covers the table's section at payment time.
schedule.drawerSectionsEmpty: No sections defined yet. Add one in restaurant settings.
schedule.drawerSectionsOverlap: Another shift already covers this section in this window.
schedule.drawerSectionsRequiresSave: Save the shift first to assign sections.

mySchedule.description: Your published shifts at this restaurant. Draft shifts won't appear until your manager publishes the week.
mySchedule.emptyDescription: Once your manager publishes the week, your shifts will show up here.

attendance.myAbsencesEmpty: You have no absence requests yet.
attendance.requestOneDayNote: Each request is for one calendar day. Submit another request for additional days.

tips.description: Cash tip entries and equal-by-hours finalization.

performance.description: Attributed orders and hours worked (from shift attendance).
performance.empty: No attributed activity in this window.

page.title: Orders
page.description: Live order dashboard. Orders update in real time.

cancel.paidPrompt: This order has been paid. Cancelling will issue a refund.

empty.noFilters: Select at least one status to view orders.
empty.noOrders: No orders match the selected filters.

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.ERROR_ADMIN_REQUIRED: You don't have permission to perform this action.
errors.ERROR_MANAGER_REQUIRED: You need manager permissions to perform this action.
errors.ERROR_INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS: You don't have the required permissions.

session.errorNotFound: This restaurant was not found or is currently unavailable. Please check the link.
session.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try refreshing the page.
session.noSession: No active session. Please return to the menu.

menu.tableRequired: Please select a table to continue
menu.notesPlaceholder: Any allergies, preferences, or notes for the kitchen? (optional)
menu.tapToStart: Tap on items to start your order
menu.noOnlineOrdering: Online ordering is not available at this restaurant yet.

cart.heading: Your Order
cart.empty: Your cart is empty. Add some items!

checkout.heading: Checkout
checkout.unableInit: Unable to initialize payment. Please try again.

orders.emptyDesc: Start an order from the menu to see it here.

adminAll.title: All Restaurants
adminAll.description: View and manage all restaurants in the system.

modal.deleteBody: It will go offline immediately, Stripe will be disconnected from this location, and all data stays recoverable for 30 days. After that, the system permanently removes the restaurant and related records (a deletion log is kept).

form.timezoneMissingHint: Set a valid IANA timezone so daily order numbers use your local business day. Until then, UTC is used.
form.orderDayStartHint: Orders are numbered per business day starting at this local time (not midnight). Example: 04:00 groups late-night sales with the previous calendar day.
form.orderNumberResetHint: How often the per-restaurant order counter resets to 1. Calendar-aligned in the restaurant's timezone, rolling over at the order-day start time above.

managers.sectionHint: These users can administer this restaurant. Removing someone as manager keeps them on the team as an employee.
managers.emptyDirectory: No people found for this organization. Invite or add users under Team.

tables.empty: No tables yet. Add your first table above.
tables.dropHere: Drop a table here or click + Add table

sections.heading: Floor sections
sections.hint: Group tables into sections (zones). Waiters get assigned to sections per shift in the schedule.
sections.defaultDeleteTooltip: The Default section can't be deleted
sections.nonEmptyDeleteTooltip: Move tables to another section first
sections.assignFailed: Failed to move table to section

stripe.heading: Payment Setup
stripe.description: Connect your Stripe account to accept customer payments.
stripe.fullySetup: Your Stripe account is connected and ready to receive payments. Customers will be charged when placing orders, and funds will be transferred to your Stripe account automatically.
stripe.requirementsPastDue: — Overdue requirements must be completed immediately.
stripe.transfersInactive: Payment transfers are not yet active. Complete onboarding to enable payments.
stripe.partialRequirements: Payments are enabled but additional requirements need attention.
stripe.intro: Set up Stripe to accept credit card payments from customers. A 6% platform fee applies on top of Stripe's standard processing fees.
stripe.resetWarning: This closes the current Stripe account and unlinks it from this restaurant. You'll need to complete onboarding again. Any existing products tied to this account will no longer be chargeable.
stripe.disconnectedClosed: Disconnected and closed Stripe account {{accountId}}. You can now onboard a new account.
stripe.disconnectedLeftOpen: Disconnected from Stripe. The previous account was left open — close it from your Stripe Dashboard if needed.

welcome.subheading: Manage your restaurants, menus, and orders. Customers scan a QR code to browse and order from their table.

feature.menuDesc: Create and manage menus with categories, items, and option groups.
feature.tableDesc: Customers order from their table via a unique link or QR code.
feature.authDesc: Manage staff roles with secure authentication via Clerk.

page.title: Menus
page.description: Create and manage your restaurant's menus. Click a menu to edit its categories and items.
page.setupRestaurantFirst: Please set up your restaurant first.

list.empty: No menus found for this restaurant.

editor.optionGroupsDescription: Create reusable option groups and link them to menu items.
editor.translatingHint: Translating names and descriptions. Prices, images, and options are shared across all languages.
editor.noCategories: No categories yet. Add your first category above.
editor.noCategoriesDescription: Group menu items into sections like Appetizers, Mains, or Desserts.
editor.headerDescription: Add categories and items to this menu.

picker.noGroups: No option groups yet. Use the Option Groups button above to create them.
picker.error: Could not load option groups. Try again.

lang.defaultLabel: Default language (used for main item names)

options.translatingHint: Translating option group and option names. Configuration and prices are shared across all languages.

page.title: Reservations
page.description: Confirm, seat, and review reservations. Updates in real time.

settingsDrawer.title: Reservation settings
settingsDrawer.description: Default turn time, per-party-size overrides, booking horizon, blackout windows, and the global accepting toggle.

locksDrawer.title: Table locks
locksDrawer.description: Take a table out of service for a window. Locked tables are hidden from public availability and the staff table picker for that window.

aria.filterViewMode: Switch between card list and table view

empty.title: No reservations in this view.
empty.description: Try a different range or status filter.

reasons.notAccepting: This restaurant isn't taking reservations right now.
reasons.outsideBookingHorizon: That time is outside the booking window. Try a closer or further-out time.
reasons.blackoutWindow: The restaurant is closed during that window.
reasons.noTables: No tables are free for that party at that time.

customerForm.title: Reserve at {{restaurantName}}
customerForm.slotsEmpty: No open times on this day for your party size. Try another date.
customerForm.name: Name
customerForm.successMessage: {{restaurantName}} will confirm shortly. We've recorded your party of {{count}} for {{when}}.

locks.empty: No locks. Add one above to take a table out of service for a window.

fieldDescriptions.accepting: Master switch. When off, customers cannot create new reservations through any channel.
fieldDescriptions.defaultTurn: How long, on average, a party occupies a table before it is considered available again.
fieldDescriptions.minAdvance: Earliest gap (in minutes) between now and a reservation start time that we still accept.
fieldDescriptions.maxAdvance: How many days into the future customers can book a reservation.
fieldDescriptions.noShowGrace: How long after the start time we wait before automatically marking a reservation as no-show.
fieldDescriptions.turnRanges: Override the default turn time for specific party-size ranges. First matching range wins.
fieldDescriptions.blackouts: Date ranges in which we will not accept any reservations regardless of other settings.

messages.usingDefaults: Using defaults. Save to persist your own values.
messages.rangeFallback: First matching range wins. If no range matches, the default turn time is used.

page.title: Dashboard
page.description: Live metrics for your restaurant. Build the layout you need.
page.noRestaurantDescription: Select or create a restaurant first to see its dashboard.

tabs.deleteConfirm: Delete this view? This cannot be undone.
tabs.emptyDescription: Create your first view to start tracking the metrics that matter.

edit.saveFailed: Could not save layout. Try again.

widget.errorDescription: Try again or pick a different range.
widget.errorRangeTooLarge: Date range too large for this widget. Pick a shorter range.
widget.errorAccessDenied: You don't have permission to view this metric.
widget.unavailableDescription: This widget type is no longer available.

picker.title: Add widget
picker.description: Pick a metric to add to this view.
picker.lockedTooltip: Manager role required to view this metric.

templates.title: Templates
templates.description: Pre-built layouts published for this restaurant.
templates.deleteConfirm: Delete this template? Existing copies are unaffected.
templates.emptyDescription: Managers can publish a layout that everyone on the team can clone.

numberWithDelta.label: Number with delta
numberWithDelta.description: A single big number with comparison to the previous period.

topMenuItems.label: Top menu items
topMenuItems.description: Highest-selling items by quantity in the date range.

revenueOverTime.label: Revenue over time
revenueOverTime.description: Successful payment totals bucketed by day.

ordersByHour.label: Orders by hour
ordersByHour.description: Average paid orders per hour-of-day across the range.

reservationsByStatus.label: Reservations by status
reservationsByStatus.description: Count of reservations starting in the window grouped by status.

tipsTotal.label: Tips total
tipsTotal.description: Tip pool entries summed over the date range with a daily sparkline.

tableOccupancy.label: Table occupancy
tableOccupancy.description: Average number of seated tables across the day.

busyTimesHeatmap.label: Busy times heatmap
busyTimesHeatmap.description: Order volume by day-of-week and hour-of-day.

status.success: Export ready. The download should start automatically.
status.error: Could not export. Please try again.
status.tooLarge: This export is too large to download in a single file. Please contact support.

exports.noYears: No data available to export yet.
